title: Eternis Plush
description: Adds a plushie of Eternis from Refresh Studios' $50,000 MrBeast mod "The First City"
body:
### Adds a plushie of Eternis from Refresh Studios' $50,000 MrBeast mod, [The First City](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-first-city).

![The Eternis Plushie sitting in an ancient city.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01e8e18a7566692f0a1f538def1bc8d0fa00b61c.png)
![The Crafting Recipes. 1 Sculk Vein makes 3 Sculk Tendrils. 3 Sculk tendrils across the bottom of the grid, an Eye of Ender in the middle and 3 Black Wool surrounding it on each side make the Eternis Plush!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7231885545c76b172b71b93b698068c8c9a808b5.png)

Put it in your base! Wear it on your head! Make a smaller one with an item frame! Fill your inventory with it. Fill your chests with it. **Worship the god eyeball until the end of time.**

doctor4t approved!
